completed: ChapterPage now enforces a three-block preview for anonymous readers and opens account creation before the rest of the article.
Anonymous users can no longer access chapter download, PDF, or print actions from the live UI.
NewsletterSignup, ExitIntentCapture, and ContentGate now require explicit consent and link to the privacy policy.
Verification completed with npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, local server smoke checks, and a Playwright screenshot of /chapter/foreword.
next_task: Replace client-bundled full chapter access with authenticated content delivery and align prerendered/free-access copy with the free-account gate.
next_priorities: Implement server-backed chapter entitlements so anonymous visitors cannot obtain full chapter payloads from client bundles.
Audit homepage and prerendered chapter messaging to distinguish free access from free-account-required access.
Connect HubSpot workflows, double opt-in, and lifecycle scoring in the portal.
